name: Atlantic Marine Construction Company v. U.S. District Court for the Western District of Texas
question:
Did the Supreme Court's decision in Stewart Organization, Inc. v. Ricoh Corp. limit review of forum selection clauses to a discretionary, balancing-of-conveniences analysis under 28 U.S.C. § 1404(a)

If so, who has the burden of proof when a party seeks to enforce or avoid a forum selection clause?
description: A case in which the Court held that the Federal Rules of Procedure allow two opposing parties in a lawsuit to transfer the litigation to a more convenient forum rather than being dismissed entirely.
